corrections.text: The article attributes the sentence about "Ultimate Unagi" being supported "for the next two years, with updates released approximately three weeks after each Scarthgap release" to Automotive Testing Technology International. That outlet does not carry the statement; the verbatim wording appears in the Linux Foundation, Automotive Grade Linux, and PR Newswire announcements, which are also cited in the article. The fact is accurate; only the inline citation pointed to the wrong outlet.
